title: Steady Energy
subtitle: Supporting increased demands
description: At this stage, your body continues to need more energy, and you may feel fatigue more often. Eating frequent, balanced meals and staying well hydrated can help maintain steady energy and overall comfort.
what_to_expect: Greater importance of regular meals and hydration
nutrition_focus: Maintain hydration consistently throughout the day
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, orange, guava, and pomegranate
Vegetables including spinach, beetroot, carrots, beans, and broccoli
Healthy snacks like nuts, roasted chana, fruit bowls, or curd
Protein and calcium sources like milk, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Skipping meals or long gaps between meals
hydration: Drink water frequently throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, lemon water, or light soups
reassurance: Frequent and balanced meals help you maintain steady energy and feel supported.

diabetes.personalized_description: Frequent and balanced meals support stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils, paneer, and nuts
diabetes.reassurance: Regular meals support steady energy and stability.

anemia.personalized_description: Iron-rich foods and regular meals support energy and help manage fatigue.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Consistent nourishment helps support your strength and energy.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals and hydration support stable blood pressure and comfort.
hypertension.reassurance: Balanced routines support a calm and steady state.

thyroid.personalized_description: Consistent meals and hydration support metabolic balance and energy levels.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency supports your body's natural rhythm.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, frequent balanced meals and proper hydration help maintain energy and stability.
priority_nutrition: Stay well hydrated throughout the day
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady nourishment and hydration support your overall well-being.
